next_actions.action: Retry a local prospect during business hours
next_actions.reason: After-hours call hit a closed-office flow; the assistant said it would try again during business hours.
next_actions.expected_revenue_path: Better contact → reply or booked call → home-service follow-up starter sale

next_actions.action: Send a short email fallback after voicemail
next_actions.reason: Voicemail was reached; the report says the AI offered to have Matthew send one short email.
next_actions.expected_revenue_path: Better contact → reply or booked call → home-service follow-up starter sale

loops.name: Owner-operated cold-call v1
loops.goal: Reach local home-service owners directly and turn one money signal into a booked follow-up.
loops.success_signal: Human reached, reply, booked call, or qualified opportunity

experiments.hypothesis: Owner-operated home-service companies are easier to reach than large-company IVR targets.
experiments.result: After-hours calls reached closed-office/voicemail paths; next best move is business-hours retry.
experiments.learning: Avoid large-company IVR batches until DTMF/direct-owner targets are solved.

summary.next_best_move: Retry a local prospect during business hours

offers.name: Home Service AI Follow-Up Starter
offers.price_or_pricing_notes: $300/month positioning in outreach copy; one recovered job should cover it.
offers.target_customer: Owner-operated or local home-service businesses that miss quote/estimate follow-up.

evidence.summary: First Vapi campaign: 7 calls, about $1.06, IVR/DTMF is the blocker.
